description:
Look up the water solubility of five chemicals on CAMEO Chemicals (https://cameochemicals.noaa.gov/) and save a ranked assessment of groundwater contamination risk to /home/ga/Documents/groundwater_risk_assessment.txt.

Chemicals:
- Benzene (CAS 71-43-2)
- Sodium Hydroxide (CAS 1310-73-2)
- Trichloroethylene (CAS 79-01-6)
- Phenol (CAS 108-95-2)
- Carbon Tetrachloride (CAS 56-23-5)

For each chemical, the file must include the chemical name, water solubility value, and groundwater risk level (HIGH for >50 mg/mL, MEDIUM for 1-50 mg/mL, LOW for <1 mg/mL). Identify the single chemical posing the highest risk in the final report.
